data.content:
```latex
\begin{align*}
\log(p_{(x,\epsilon),(\theta,\phi)}(x,\epsilon)) - \log(p_\epsilon(\epsilon)) &= \log(p_H(h)) - D_X \log(\sigma) + \log(|\det \frac{\partial g_\phi}{\partial \epsilon}(\epsilon;x)|) - \log(p_\epsilon(\epsilon)) \\
&= \log(p_H(h)) - D_X \log(\sigma) - \log(q_{Z|X;\phi}(z)) \\
&= \log(p_\xi(\xi)p_Z(z)) - D_X \log(\sigma) - \log(q_{Z|X;\phi}(z)) \\
&= \log(p_\xi(\xi)) + \log(p_Z(z)) - D_X \log(\sigma) - \log(q_{Z|X;\phi}(z)) \\
&= \log(p_\xi(\xi)) - D_X \log(\sigma) + \log(p_Z(z)) - \log(q_{Z|X;\phi}(z)) \\
&= \log(p_{X|Z}(x \mid z)) + \log(p_Z(z)) - \log(q_{Z|X;\phi}(z))
\end{align*}
```

```latex
\begin{align*}
\log(p_{(x,\epsilon),(\theta,\phi)}(x,\epsilon)) - \log(p_\epsilon(\epsilon)) &= \log(p_H(h)) - D_X \log(\sigma) + \log(|\det \frac{\partial g_\phi}{\partial \epsilon}(\epsilon;x)|) - \log(p_\epsilon(\epsilon)) \\
&= \log(p_H(h)) - D_X \log(\sigma) - \log(q_{Z|X;\phi}(z)) \\
&= \log(p_\xi(\xi)p_Z(z)) - D_X \log(\sigma) - \log(q_{Z|X;\phi}(z)) \\
&= \log(p_\xi(\xi)) + \log(p_Z(z)) - D_X \log(\sigma) - \log(q_{Z|X;\phi}(z)) \\

&= \log(p_{X|Z}(x \mid z)) + \log(p_Z(z)) - \log(q_{Z|X;\phi}(z))
\end{align*}
```
